|| рқ‘°рқ’Һрқ’‘рқ’“рқ’җрқ’Һрқ’‘рқ’•рқ’– рқ’Һрқ’Ҷрқ’Ҷрқ’• рқ’–рқ’‘ ||

вңҰ Ad Astra per Aspera вңҰ

вӢ…ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§ аӯЁаӯ§ вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ вӢ… | Years ago, you walked away from your marriage to Matthias, the man who once knew you better than anyone, the man who rebuilt himself after you shattered the life you shared. Now he is polished, controlled, remarried, and entirely untouchable, or so he pretends. When fate throws you back into his orbit in the most ordinary of places, old wounds resurface beneath practiced composure, and the silence between you says more than any argument ever did. Because some loves do not end when the papers are signed. (Read definition for more info)
